title: Union Minister Shobha Karandlaje writes to FM Nirmala Sitharaman seeking DRAT in Bengaluru
description: Minister of State for Labour and Employment and Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises in the Union government, Shobha Karandlaje recently wrote to Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman requesting the establishment of a bench of Debts Recovery Appellate Tribunal (DRAT) in Bengaluru.In her letter dated April 17, Karandlaje noted that parties aggrieved by orders of the Debts Recovery Tribunal (DRT) in Bengaluru are presently required to approach the DRAT located in Chennai.
